items.title: Welcome to Termtastic news
items.body: The desktop app can now surface short announcements right here. Click the News pill any time to catch up, and close a card to dismiss it for good.

items.title: Split panes
items.body: Split any tab horizontally or vertically, then drag the divider to resize. Double-click a divider to reset it to an even split.

items.title: Six new bundled themes
items.body: Head to Settings > Appearance for Solarized, Gruvbox, and four more. Light and dark slots are picked independently, so each follows your system appearance.

items.title: Markdown & git diff previews
items.body: Open a .md file in the file browser to see it rendered, and review changes inline in the git diff viewer.
